overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a dark concrete underpass emerging into the sunlit streets of Night City, featuring towering futuristic skyscrapers, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: NCPD police vehicle with illuminated markings passes by on the right
bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the underpass sidewalk toward the distant exit light

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car driving past with glowing text markings

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling with exposed beams spanning the tunnel
linear overhead lighting fixtures illuminating the walkway
tall gray concrete wall running along the left side of the path
painted yellow safety line marking the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit concrete underpass with fluorescent ceiling lights and a tall retaining wall on the left. Vehicles pass by on the right while the camera moves steadily toward the bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: exits the underpass into bright open urban environment with towering buildings
scene becomes fully illuminated by direct sunlight creating sharp architectural shadows

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past towering cyberpunk skyscrapers and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car cruising along the multi-lane avenue

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive orange facade and corporate signage
modern cylindrical building with reflective blue glass exterior
enclosed skybridge connecting buildings across the street
large illuminated screen displaying commercial advertisements
tropical trees planted along the elevated wall edge

segments.scene_description: Having emerged from the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant futuristic metropolis. Towering skyscrapers with glass and orange facades rise against a clear blue sky, while digital billboards and palm trees line the street. Vehicles continue to pass by on the right as the camera proceeds along the sunlit sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass into the brilliant light of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving steadily through a dimly lit tunnel, flanked by a tall retaining wall and flickering fluorescent ceiling lights while vehicles stream past on the right. As the camera approaches the bright exit, the enclosed space suddenly opens into a vibrant city street under a clear blue sky. The scene then expands to reveal towering glass skyscrapers with orange facades and glowing digital billboards, with the lighting shifting from artificial gloom to warm sunlight. Finally, the camera proceeds along a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees as traffic continues to flow through the urban landscape.
